name: Izmir Firca Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Izmir Fir√É¬ßa Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi produces and sells various cleaning and painting brushes in Turkey and internationally. The company offers hand tools, brushes, rollers, mops, and squeegees for cleaning fields; and custom brushes for industries. It also provides construction products; and PET-PVC synthetic monofilaments fibers for brushes and brooms. The company is based in Izmir, Turkey.
